A BasiXa Product ↗

The OS built
for everyone.

MAX OS is a Linux-based desktop operating system with native Android app support, beautiful design, and the power to replace Windows — completely free.

Bootable on any 64-bit PC

Why MAX OS
Built different.
Works better.

Every feature is designed intentionally — from the first boot to the last shutdown.

🤖
Android App Support
Run WhatsApp, Instagram, Spotify, PUBG — any Android app — natively on your desktop via Waydroid integration.
Learn more →
⚡
Boots in Under 4 Seconds
Optimized startup sequence and lightweight kernel means you're at your desktop faster than any other OS.
Learn more →
🎨
Beautiful by Default
Light and dark themes, 12 built-in wallpapers, accent colors, and smooth animations — stunning out of the box.
Learn more →
🔒
Private by Design
No telemetry, no ads, no data collection. Your machine, your data — full stop.
Learn more →
🛍️
MAX Store
One store for Linux and Android apps. Install, update, and manage everything from a single beautiful interface.
Learn more →
🖥️
Familiar to Everyone
Taskbar, Start menu, File manager — exactly where Windows users expect them. Zero learning curve.
Learn more →

Source Code
Open source · Contribute & build
GitHub GPL v3 PRs Welcome
Star us if you like MAX OS!
System Requirements
MAX OS runs on almost any modern PC. If it ran Windows 10, it runs MAX OS.
Processor 64-bit x86 CPUIntel or AMD · 2012+
RAM 4 GB minimum8 GB recommended
Storage 20 GB freeSSD recommended
Graphics Any GPUNVIDIA · AMD · Intel
Display 1280×720 min1080p recommended
Network OptionalFor updates & Android
⚠️ For Android app support (Waydroid), enable VT-x / AMD-V virtualization in your BIOS settings.
